top_strength: Strong no-hidden-fees pitch and differentiator coverage — On-Time Guarantee, $2,000 damage coverage, and trip fee exemption all delivered naturally.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass was completely skipped, and the agenda opener was absent — two highest-leverage habits to build.
phone_presence_notes: Professional and competent but transactional — customer name rarely used and no warmth or rapport moments visible.
